zh.Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾
zh.Forfar, Angusshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Fynbella De Douglas De Means於1100年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾時，她的父親Lord John De Maxwell24歲，母親Maria De Maxwell De Means24歲。她於大約1117年與First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich在英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1160年在英國蘇格蘭Forfarshire享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英国苏格兰安格斯福爾法爾
zh-hans.Forfar, Angusshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰安格斯福爾法爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fynbella De Douglas De Means于1100年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾时，她的父亲Lord John De Maxwell24岁，母亲Maria De Maxwell De Means24岁。她于大约1117年与First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich在英国苏格兰安格斯福爾法爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1160年在英国苏格兰Forfarshire享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Means
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Meen, with post-medieval excrescent -s. See Mean .

variants.name: Mean
meanings: Cambodian: written មាន, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘to be rich’.
English: nickname from Middle English mene ‘inferior, lowly; poor; unpleasant’.

English: from the Middle English personal name Mene, of uncertain origin. In mid 9th-century France a rare female name Menia is recorded, which might ultimately derive from Latin Maenia, a Roman surname. However, there is no evidence available to suggest that this name was introduced to England by the Normans.

en.lifeSummary: When Fynbella De Douglas De Means was born in 1100, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Lord John De Maxwell, was 24 and her mother, Maria De Maxwell De Means, was 24. She married First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich about 1117, in Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1160, in Forfarshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fynbella De Douglas De Means est née en 1100, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord John De Maxwell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Maria De Maxwell De Means, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich environ 1117, à Forfar, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1160, à Forfarshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fynbella De Douglas De Means 1100 in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord John De Maxwell 24 und ihre Mutter Maria De Maxwell De Means 24. Sie hat um 1117 in Forfar, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1160 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Forfarshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fynbella De Douglas De Means è nata il nel 1100 nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord John De Maxwell, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Maria De Maxwell De Means, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich circa 1117, nel Forfar, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1160, nel Forfarshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Fynbella De Douglas De Meansが1100年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord John De Maxwellは24歳，母Maria De Maxwell De Meansは24歳であった。約1117年にイギリススコットランドアンガスフォーファルでFirst Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1160年にイギリススコットランドForfarshireで60歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Fynbella De Douglas De Means(이)가 1100년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord John De Maxwell(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria De Maxwell De Means(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1117년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 포파르에서 First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 스코틀랜드 Forfarshire에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fynbella De Douglas De Means nasceu em 1100, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord John De Maxwell, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Maria De Maxwell De Means, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich aproximadamente 1117, em Forfar, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1160, em Forfarshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fynbella De Douglas De Means родилась в 1100 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord John De Maxwell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Maria De Maxwell De Means, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich около 1117 г. в местности форфар, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1160 г. в местности Forfarshire, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fynbella De Douglas De Means nació en 1100, en Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord John De Maxwell, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Maria De Maxwell De Means, tenía 24 años. Se casó con First Mórmaer of Angus Dufugan mac Indrechtaich aproximadamente 1117, en Forfar, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1160, en Forfarshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
